mapper.sql: d.id, d.user_id, d.title, d.content, d.mood_type, d.weather_type, d.city, d.is_private, d.create_time, d.update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mood_diary ( user_id, title, content, mood_type, weather_type, city, is_private, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{moodType}, #{weatherType}, #{city}, #{isPrivate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE mood_diary
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, mood_type = #{moodType}, weather_type = #{weatherType}, city = #{city}, is_private = #{isPrivate}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
